On the morrow, at dawn the required materials possessing the
prescribed qualities are to be brought to the same place of worship
and offered on the ground; and the following verses bearing on this
subject have been imparted by the Sage viz. Vrddhagarga :
[The idea is that the materials mentioned in the following
verses are to he placed in the appropriate compartments of the
circular diagram drawn on the ground and then the various Deities
worshipped.]
